message:
Add heartbeat sequence tracking to StreamingSession and Supervisor

Expose heartbeat_seq() and ack_seq() counters on the StreamingSession
trait so the supervisor can log heartbeat health diagnostics. Previously,
the supervisor only knew about timestamps, with no way to detect
scenarios like "ack received but seq mismatch" or "3 heartbeats sent,
0 acknowledged."

- Add heartbeat_seq() and ack_seq() default trait methods (return 0)
- Implement counters in InMemoryStreamingSession with saturating_add
- Add missed_heartbeats field to StreamingSupervisorStats
- Add health_log_fields() helper for structured logging
- Forward trait methods in FakeStreamingSession (testkit)
- Update golden vector and state tests for new fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
